name: banyan
description: A hierarchical, self-compounding agent harness ported to OpenAI Codex. Lead agents own whole subtrees and spawn their own children via multi_agent_v1; coordination happens through a file-based run ledger; lessons are harvested at the leaves and consolidated by a background curator.
install_note: Banyan installs from the Codex render (dist/codex/) via a single node command. It copies the skills tree to <CODEX_HOME>/skills/banyan/ and the 55 agent TOMLs to <CODEX_HOME>/agents/. Codex's native plugin install registers skills only (never agents) and reads this repo's Claude-format marketplace pointing at plugin/, not the Codex render — so the direct copy is the supported path. See docs/codex-install.md.
verified: Install path verified on codex-cli 0.139.0: 19 skills discovered, 55 agents registered, multi_agent stable+enabled, $bn-hello reports the version. The full delegation (R25) check is the remaining manual confirmation.
